remaining_tasks.name: GC-011: no_data supervisor route overridden by intent.needs_clarification
remaining_tasks.description: In graph.py _route_after_intent(), check supervisor_route=='no_data' BEFORE intent.needs_clarification.

remaining_tasks.name: FedStat cumulative data: period_columns regex \d{4} misses monthly/cumulative columns
remaining_tasks.description: fedstat_adapter.py line 203: period_columns = [col for col in logical_columns if re.fullmatch(r'\d{4}', str(col))]. Columns like 'Янв', 'фев.2023' are dropped entirely. Need to detect and handle non-year period columns for cumulative sources like 61502.

remaining_tasks.name: SSE hang: Думает stays on screen after pipeline ends
remaining_tasks.description: server.py _handle_stream finally block may not send terminal SSE event on error paths.

remaining_tasks.name: Variant B: code-gen extraction agent with schema awareness + retries
remaining_tasks.description: Replace static adapters with LLM that sees real parquet schema and writes DuckDB queries. Multiple attempts on error. User agreed: do A first, then B.

decisions.rationale: Fix degradation path first (narrator always called, partial results surface); then code-gen extraction agent
partial is accepted by _coverage_all_ok(); skipped_with_reason kills extraction pipeline entirely

decisions.decision: needs_repair + ok dataset with rows>0 → passed
decisions.rationale: Surface extracted data as partial analysis rather than silence

decisions.decision: has_records checks non-null values (value is not None)
decisions.rationale: 198 WB rows all value=None caused contradictory narrator output (data_signal=НАЙДЕНЫ for nulls)
Last remaining node at 512; Research Designer 1024, Narrator 2048
False positives on rounded/scaled values; adapters guarantee source-bound numbers

decisions.decision: LLM unavailable → gated/stopped, zero fallback paths
FedStat geo detection: ОКАТО+ОКСМ added to needle list
decisions.rationale: Wide Parquet files use Russian classifier column names

decisions.decision: JSON max_tokens: 1024 for Research Designer, 2048 for Narrator
decisions.rationale: Russian prose compresses poorly; 512 too small

next_action: Run full 20-case golden eval to measure pass rate after 11 fixes. Then fix gc011-routing and fedstat-period-filter.
context_notes: Session analyzed root cause of extraction/artifact failures: pipeline had too many binary fail-fast points where partial data silently became not_found. Fix A (graceful degradation) shipped at a50b8ca — 4 files changed. Fix B (code-gen extraction agent) is next architectural step agreed with user.
